_note: Rebumped 2026-06-02. f_res moved 1.6923->1.9409 GHz (deterministic, bit-identical over 2 trials; the old 1.69 GHz mode is gone, not an amplitude flip). Bisect attributes the shift to the v1.7.5 per-face CPML/PMC-padding correctness fix e340644 (1.6923->1.8895; its own message documents that removing spurious CPML absorption of the patch-cavity modal field shifts eigenfrequencies) plus c8b17f8 Stage-2 PEC/NU fix (->1.9409). NOT 77daeb8 (its inverse-eps path needs subpixel_smoothing='kottke_pec', which _build_sim leaves default-off) and NOT the EPS_0/MU_0 post-2019 SI update (zero movement at this resolution). The new value is MORE physical: a TM010 cavity model (eps_r=4.3, ~36mm) gives ~2.0 GHz, so 1.94 is ~4% low (staircase-consistent at 1mm cells) vs the old 1.69's ~16% CPML-bleed deficit. Equivalence/bit-identity pin, opt-in slow_physics.
